title: prunus padus subsp. racemosa
intro: Prunus padus subsp. racemosa, also known as the bird cherry or European bird cherry, is a shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family. The bark, leaves, and fruits of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus padus subsp. racemosa include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried bark, leaves, or fruits in hot water or a solvent.
